title: Project: D20
description: A sandbox pack for a few friends.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XfgYDBf5/images/e624fedef313d6e1a6da11a6165ecf352311b637.png)

## Welcome to **Project D:20**
This is mainly a kitchen sink-style pack for a few friends to play together, without a focus on balance or compatibility. What it is focused on, however, is remaining light and accessible to all minecrafters and their computers. :3
